description_long: This is a wooden baseball bat with a classic tapered cylindrical shape, featuring a thicker barrel that gradually narrows down to a thinner handle. The barrel is reinforced with several metallic bands or rings, giving it a rugged, reinforced appearance, possibly for durability or aesthetic effect. The wood grain is visible along the length of the bat, with a natural brown coloration and some darker, reddish tones near the handle. The handle appears slightly darker and may have a subtle grip texture, but no distinct grip tape is present. The end cap is rounded and matches the wood material, with no visible separation or additional design. There are no visible brand logos, manufacturer names, or decorative markings on the barrel or handle.
description: A classic wooden baseball bat with metallic bands around the barrel and a natural brown finish. The bat has a tapered shape and no visible logos or grip tape.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bat, highlighting the metallic bands on the barrel and the natural wood grain.
description_view_1: Top-down view focusing on the handle and the alignment of the metallic bands, with the handle appearing slightly darker.
description_view_2: Opposite side view of the bat, again showing the metallic bands and the smooth, tapered wood surface.
description_view_3: End-on view of the bat, displaying the rounded wooden end cap with no distinct markings.
attribute_end_cap_design: The end cap is rounded, made of the same wood as the rest of the bat, with a smooth texture and no visible logos or markings.
